title: Polaroid just dropped the most iconic anti-AI ad of the year
abstract: Polaroid has truly hit the nail on the head with their year-defining anti-AI ad. Imagine a vintage camera saying, "No way! I'm sticking to analog!" It's hilarious and relatable. Check it out!
abstract_zh: 这回Polaroid真的火了！他们刚推出了一则年度最经典的反AI广告，简直让人拍案叫绝！你想象一下，一张胶卷相机在说：“不！我要保持原始！”是不是觉得超有梗？快来围观吧！
